Sets the specified byte order used to interpret multi-byte raw data correctly.

Prints detailed help information describing the available command-line options.

Splits a byte array of null-delimited strings into individual strings using UTF-8.

strictMode - Variable in class png.ChunkHandler
 
stripExifPreamble(byte[]) - Static method in class jpg.JpgParser
Removes the 6-byte Exif\0\0 signature/header required by the JPEG standard before passing the payload to a TIFF parser.
